---
title: "03. Fold：过量如何被折回稳定域"
subtitle: "Fold: How Excess Is Returned to Stability"
date: 2026-04-10
order: 3
categories: [synthesis, cultural, omega]
description: "Cross-text synthesis essay tracing `fold_is_idempotent` across 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本."
---

**主定理核 / Primary Lean Anchor:** `fold_is_idempotent`  
**覆盖文本 / Works:** 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本

{{< include articles/synthesis_03_fold_operator.md >}}

---

[Back to Synthesis Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
